problem_solved: Medicaid and Medicare members often miss medical appointments due to lack of reliable transportation, leading to worse health outcomes and increased emergency department utilization
solution_description: Non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) and supportive care platform combining people, technology, and data to manage 35M+ paid trips annually. MyModivcare hub for ride booking, combined with remote patient monitoring and medication management services. Serves Medicaid plans, Medicare/SNP plans, and health systems
notes: Largest NEMT provider in US (formerly Logisticare). Combined transportation and RPM/monitoring services. 40-60% reduction in ER utilization reported. Medium Varden fit - more payer-focused than provider-focused.
